rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces local property tax bases, indirectly affecting tier one M&O tax rates (TR) and maximum compressed rates (MCR) that drive the basic allotment formula. No direct textual conflict, but downstream rulemaking under §48.2551 may need adjustment.
quote:
"TR" is the district's tier one maintenance and operations tax rate, as provided by Section 45.0032; and
"MCR" is the district's maximum compressed tax rate, as determined under Section 48.2551.
_note: Indirect fiscal linkage via tax rate compression; no direct reference to §11.13(b) in §48.051 text.
